evals.prompt: 프로젝트 문서를 업데이트해줘. CODEMAPS랑 HUMANMAPS 둘 다 갱신해줘.
evals.expected_output: 파이프라인 실행: detect_changes → extract_structure → CODEMAPS/HUMANMAPS 생성
expectations: Runs detect_changes.mjs script or equivalent change detection
Runs extract_structure.mjs script or equivalent structure extraction
Creates or updates CODEMAPS INDEX.md file
Creates or updates HUMANMAPS HTML file
Follows pipeline order: detect → extract → generate

evals.prompt: 백엔드 API 코드가 변경됐어. CODEMAPS만 부분 업데이트해줘
evals.expected_output: 변경 감지 후 해당 모듈만 갱신, HUMANMAPS 스킵
expectations: Detects changes scoped to backend API files
Extracts structure from nest-api source files
Preserves existing documentation for unchanged modules

evals.prompt: 전체 프로젝트 구조를 스캔하고 HUMANMAPS 문서만 새로 생성해줘
evals.expected_output: 전체 스캔 후 HUMANMAPS HTML만 생성
expectations: Extracts structure from all scanned services
Skips CODEMAPS generation as not requested
